name: Iter18 — Developer profile shows chart and stats after submitting a review
description: After analyzing a PR, the developer profile page for that PR author shows the Score History chart with data points, stat cards with real numbers, and a reviews table — not just empty states.

planSteps.description: Type https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1 into the PR input field
Click the Analyze PR button and wait for the review to complete
Verify the review report is visible with a score and verdict
Find the most recent review row and note its repo or PR title
Type the GitHub username timer in the Developer Search input in the navbar and click View Profile
Verify the developer profile page loads with the GitHub avatar and username heading
Verify the stat cards show real numbers — Total PRs is at least 1, Avg Score shows a number
Verify the Score History section shows a chart with at least one data point rather than an empty state message
